categories.sub-heading: Served with a side of chips

items.name: The Vegetarian Club Sandwich
items.description: Layers of grilled paneer, juicy tomatoes, crisp lettuce, onions, and bell peppers with a creamy homestyle sauce, stacked between toasted bread and served with a side of crisps. Hearty, fresh and deeply satisfying.

items.name: Japanese Egg Sando
items.description: Soft, fluffy eggs folded into a creamy Japanese-style filling and tucked between pillowy bread. Delicate, comforting, and beautifully simple.

items.name: Falafel Hummus Sandwich
items.description: Crispy falafel layered with creamy hummus, fresh lettuce, cucumber, juicy tomatoes, and a hint of lemon tucked into warm, soft bread. Fresh, herby and authentic.

items.name: Japanese Soufflé Pancakes
items.description: Light-as-air pancakes with a soft, bouncy texture and delicate sweetness. Served warm with fresh cream and house-style syrup. A delicate indulgence, made to be savored.

items.name: Berry Cream Pancakes
items.description: Soft, fluffy pancakes served with house-made berry compote, whipped cream and maple syrup. Fruity, buttery and much indulgent.

items.name: Blueberry Lemon Muffins
items.description: Made with fresh lemon zest and juicy blueberries, these soft, buttery muffins are light, tangy and baked for that just-out-of-the-oven goodness.

items.name: Double Chocolate Banana Bread
items.description: Made with ripe bananas, cocoa and dark chocolate chunks. Moist, fudgy and just the right amount of sweet.Our most loved bake!

items.name: Cinnamon Rolls with Raspberry Icing.
items.description: Soft, pillowy cinnamon rolls baked fresh and swirled with warm cinnamon sugar. Topped with a fresh raspberry cream frosting that adds just the right richness.

items.name: Orange Bundt Cake
items.description: Moist orange Bundt cake made with freshly squeezed orange juice and fragrant orange zest, finished with a light citrus glaze. Bright, tender and delightfully zesty.
